hero.title: Meet the Team
hero.subtitle: The people committed to making Africa's next generation dream and do.

founder.title: Meet the Founder
founder.name: Founder Name
founder.story: DreamDo was born from a simple observation: too many talented young Africans were finishing school without the practical skills, confidence, or professional exposure needed to turn their potential into impact. The founder set out to change that — one hands-on learning experience at a time.
founder.motivation: Growing up, I watched peers with enormous potential get held back not by lack of intelligence, but by lack of opportunity. DreamDo is the opportunity I wished existed — structured, practical, and designed to unlock what young people already have inside them.
founder.vision: I envision a continent where a child's ZIP code does not determine their destiny — where every young person, regardless of background, has access to the experiences they need to build a meaningful future.

team.title: Our Team
team.placeholder: Team bios coming soon. We're building something great — and hiring!
